Container.Name: SelfDashboard
Container.Overview: SelfDashboard — modular home dashboard (Unraid, Emby, Docker widget, etc.). Docker widget: bind-mount the host Docker socket (see Docker Socket). Extra parameter `--group-add=281` matches the usual Unraid `docker` group GID for socket access (change if `stat -c '%g' /var/run/docker.sock` differs). Custom plugin files on the Unraid disk only appear inside the container if you bind-mount a host folder to /app/plugins/custom — the container filesystem does not include random host paths without that volume.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the SelfDashboard web interface.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Your local timezone. Example: Europe/Berlin, America/New_York

Config.Name: Config Storage
Config.Description: Path where SelfDashboard stores its configuration and data.

Config.Name: Custom Plugins Path
Config.Description: Bind-mount a host folder to /app/plugins/custom. Files you add on Unraid only exist inside the container through this mapping — without the volume, the container cannot see host folders (same idea as the Docker socket). Remove the mapping if you do not use custom plugins.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Same as -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock (read-only). Required for the Docker widget. If you see EACCES, the template adds --group-add=281 (typical Unraid docker GID); adjust Extra Parameters if your `stat -c '%g' /var/run/docker.sock` differs. Only this Unraid's containers, not remote Docker.

Config.Name: Node Environment
Config.Description: Leave production unless you know you need development mode.
